creator: avg@icyb.net.ua
text:
tmake build system is patched to honor CXX for C++ compilation,
but for linking g++ is hardcoded.
This patch makes tmake build system use CXX for linking as well.

Port maintainer (jesse@cs.uni-magdeburg.de) is cc'd.
Please note that maintainer's email seems to bounce.
